phase_title: Internal Scopes, Service Identity and Audit Foundation
activation_note: P0-SEC-B was published successfully. P0-SEC-C is selected but blocked because persisted service identity, scopes, expiry, revocation, and audit lifecycle require Prisma schema and migration approval.

last_result.selected_reason: Shared-token role/scope/expiry/revocation/audit findings require persisted service identity and migration.
